meta.title: Alec Ortega Cisneros | Software Developer
meta.description: Software Developer with experience in React, .NET, and Django. Built internal systems, e-commerce platforms, and full-stack applications for enterprise and startup environments.

about.bio: Software Developer with experience building full-stack web applications using React, .NET, Django, and modern JavaScript frameworks. Passionate about clean code, scalable architecture, and delivering real-world solutions in enterprise and startup environments.

experience.title: Frontend Web Developer & IT Support
experience.company: Seguros de las Californias (Hospital Excel) - Tijuana, B.C., Mexico
experience.description: Developed and maintained an internal web system using Django (Python) and React (Vite), deployed on IONOS with Nginx and Git. Led frontend improvements and backend integration for critical business modules.
achievements: Built CRUD modules for client onboarding, company manuals, and insurance issuance orders.
Created a SpeedDial AI search module that retrieves legal articales via Google queries.
Built a 3D cube module with Swiper.js for cybersecurity training content.
Improved UI, fixed bugs, and debugged with Chrome DevTools to keep the app stable.
Set up laptops and Microsoft 365, managed Active Directory accounts, and configured SMB scan-to-folder on Windows Server.

experience.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
experience.description: Developed internal web applications to streamline team performance tracking and inventory forecasting.
achievements: Built a survey system using ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server for manager feedback.
Created an inventory monitoring tool to project product availability and demand.

certifications.name: Git & GitHub, Docker, NPM, React.js, HTML/CSS, OOP with JavaScript

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering

projects.name: Cetys Academy
projects.goal: Allow students to search for academic resources online.

projects.name: Cetys-Inventory
projects.goal: Make a library book tracking system for the university.
